title: Callista kuhlii
taxonomy: Callista kuhlii is classified as a species of sea snail, specifically within the family Veneridae. It is a type of clam, belonging to the order Veneroida. This species is further divided into the kingdom Animalia, phylum Mollusca, and class Bivalvia. The classification also includes the family and genus levels, Veneridae and Callista, respectively. This classification helps to identify and categorize Callista kuhlii within the broader context of mollusk classification.
uses: Callista kuhlii, a species of sea snail, is not typically known for its medicinal uses. However, certain species of sea snails have been used in traditional medicine. Some species of snails, not specifically Callista kuhlii, have been used to create a natural dye. More research is needed to determine the potential medicinal uses of Callista kuhlii.
